        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'W':
                b = n['boundary']
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                print(f"  white rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} width={max(cols)-min(cols)+1}")
        print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
        
        if not last_action_result.get('level_completed', False):
            # Try (-1, -2): click blue block 4 again
            print("\nTrying (-1, -2):")
            action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}])
            seg = current_frame.segmentation
            for n in seg['nodes']:
                if n['color'] == 'W':
                    b = n['boundary']
                    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                    print(f"  white rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} width={max(cols)-min(cols)+1}")
            print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
